growth_records.strain: MAG-based population (n=3 MAGs), not axenic culture
growth_records.medium: Freshwater reservoir water column (epilimnion), Římov Reservoir, Czech Republic
growth_records.cite: Kavagutti et al. High-resolution metagenomic reconstruction of the freshwater spring bloom. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-022-01451-4. [PMC9878933]
growth_records.snippet: Ca. Fonsibacter (3) 114.66 ± 113.2 [CARD-FISH, Observed in situ, h]
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (114.66 ± 113.2 h) is the CARD-FISH 'Observed, in situ' value from Table 1. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/114.66 = 0.0060 h-1. Alternative metagenomic-based observed value (106.78 h), mortality-corrected estimates (62.99 h CARD-FISH; 76.07 h metagenomic), and gRodon estimate (31.12 h) also reported but not used here. Very high SD (±113.2 h) reflects high uncertainty; only n=3 MAGs.
